name: leopardi-pwa
description: PWA didattica su Leopardi con setup Capacitor per Android e iOS.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --delete --exclude '.git' --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude 'dist' --exclude 'android' --exclude 'ios' ./ dist/
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
